emails.subject: enpower login
emails.body: enpower login I used the following login information we set up during our presentation, however, I got the following error message: user name: cwatts password: cwatts Unknown user name or password. ORA 01017 invalid username/password; logon denied Alias Power. Thanks immensely for the EnPower presentation and all the helpful information. We will be in touch.
